revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿五]][[zh:十二月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 25|qq=December 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 25''' is the 25th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Chōwa|en|Chōwa|qid=Q1194173|lt=Chōwa|1=Chōwa}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1013|en|1013|qid=Q19241|lt=1013|1=1013}} {{ill|February 8|en|February 8|qid=Q2323|lt=February 8|1=February 8}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} to {{ill|Chōwa|en|Chōwa|qid=Q1194173|lt=Chōwa|1=Chōwa}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bunka|1=Bun'ei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}} {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}}) – The history of the {{ill|Dai Nihonshi|en|Dai Nihonshi|qid=Q1156003|lt=Dai Nihonshi|1=Dai Nihonshi}}, initiated by {{ill|Mito Mitsukuni|ja|水戸光圀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mito Mitsukuni|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川光圀|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川光圀|1=Tokugawa Mitsukuni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194944}}, was nearly completed and presented to the bakufu. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}}) – Telegraph lines were opened between Tokyo and Yokohama, and the handling of telegrams began. == Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1539|en|1539|qid=Q6479|lt=1539|1=1539}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|en|Maeda Toshiie|qid=Q1196817|lt=Maeda Toshiie|1=Maeda Toshiie}}, one of the {{ill|Council of Five Elders|en|Council of Five Elders|qid=Q1154511|lt=Godaidō|1=Council of Five Elders}} and the first head of the {{ill|Kaga Domain|en|Kaga Domain|qid=Q903448|lt=Kaga Domain|1=Kaga Domain}} (died {{ill|1599|en|1599|qid=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}}). * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1686|en|1686|qid=Q7664|lt=1686|1=1686}} {{ill|January 19|en|January 19|qid=Q2266|lt=January 19|1=January 19}}) – {{ill|Hakuin Ekaku|en|Hakuin Ekaku|qid=Q177059|lt=Hakugen Keikaku|1=Hakuin Ekaku}}, a Zen monk (died {{ill|1768|en|1768|qid=Q7675|lt=1768|1=1768}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}) – {{ill|Takamatsu Ryōun|ja|高松凌雲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Ryōun|1=Takamatsu Ryoūn|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531595}}, a physician (died {{ill|1916|en|1916|qid=Q2087|lt=1916|1=1916}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}) – {{ill|Inoue Tetsujirō|en|Inoue Tetsujirō|qid=Q382335|lt=Inoue Tetsujirō|1=Inoue Tetsujirō}}, a philosopher (died {{ill|1944|en|1944|qid=Q5268|lt=1944|1=1944}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1784|en|1784|qid=Q7752|lt=1784|1=1784}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}}) – {{ill|Yosa Buson|en|Yosa Buson|qid=Q31523|lt=Yosa Buson|1=Yosa Buson}}, a haiku poet (born {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōmei|en|Emperor Kōmei|qid=Q299179|lt=Kōmei Tennō|1=Emperor Kōmei}}, the 121st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1831|en|1831|qid=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|24|12|26|11|25|1|12|1225|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 25일]] [[ja:12月25日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月廿五]]
[[ar:December 25 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月廿五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月廿五]] {{wikidata link|Q840564}} [[Category:Days 25 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar December]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
